message:
feat(project): initialize Rust project with core dependencies and tooling

This commit establishes the foundational project structure for rich_rust,
a Rust port of Python's Rich library for beautiful terminal output.

## Project Configuration

### Cargo.toml
- Package: rich_rust v0.1.0
- Edition: Rust 2024 (requires nightly)
- License: MIT
- Repository: https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust

### Core Dependencies
- bitflags 2: Efficient text attribute storage using 16-bit bitfields
- regex 1: Markup tag parsing for [bold red]...[/] syntax
- crossterm 0.28: Cross-platform terminal detection and manipulation
- unicode-width 0.2: Accurate CJK and emoji cell width calculation
- lru 0.12: LRU cache for color parsing optimization
- num-rational 0.4: Exact fraction arithmetic for table column ratios
- once_cell 1.19: Lazy static initialization patterns

### Optional Features
- syntax: Syntax highlighting via syntect 5
- markdown: Markdown rendering via pulldown-cmark 0.12
- json: JSON pretty-printing via serde_json 1.0
- full: All optional features combined

### Development Dependencies
- criterion 0.5: Benchmarking framework
- insta 1.40: Snapshot testing with glob and filter support
- tracing 0.1 + tracing-subscriber 0.3: Structured test logging
- tracing-test 0.2, test-log 0.2: Test logging integration

### Release Profile (optimized for distribution)
- opt-level = "z": Optimize for binary size
- lto = true: Link-time optimization enabled
- codegen-units = 1: Single codegen unit for maximum optimization
- panic = "abort": Smaller binary without unwinding overhead
- strip = true: Debug symbols removed

### Toolchain
- rust-toolchain.toml specifies nightly channel requirement

### Git Configuration
- .gitignore: Excludes target/, legacy_rich/, .bv/
- .gitattributes: Custom merge driver for beads JSONL

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+[package]
+name = "rich_rust"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+description = "A Rust port of Python's Rich library for beautiful terminal output"
+authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel"]
+license = "MIT"
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/rich_rust"
+keywords = ["terminal", "cli", "rich", "ansi", "formatting"]
+categories = ["command-line-interface", "text-processing"]
+
+[dependencies]
+# Text attributes as efficient bitflags
+bitflags = "2"
+
+# Regular expressions for markup parsing
+regex = "1"
+
+# Terminal detection and raw terminal manipulation
+crossterm = "0.28"
+
+# Unicode character cell width calculation
+unicode-width = "0.2"
+
+# LRU cache for color parsing and style computation
+lru = "0.12"
+
+# Exact fraction arithmetic for ratio distribution
+num-rational = "0.4"
+
+# Lazy static initialization
+once_cell = "1.19"
+
+# Syntax highlighting (Phase 3)
+syntect = { version = "5", optional = true }
+
+# Markdown rendering (Phase 3)
+pulldown-cmark = { version = "0.12", optional = true }
+
+# JSON rendering (Phase 4)
+serde_json = { version = "1.0", optional = true }
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+criterion = "0.5"
+
+# Snapshot testing for visual regression detection
+insta = { version = "1.40", features = ["glob", "filters"] }
+
+# Test logging infrastructure
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter", "fmt", "json"] }
+tracing-test = "0.2"
+test-log = { version = "0.2", features = ["trace"] }
+
+[features]
+default = []
+syntax = ["syntect"]
+markdown = ["pulldown-cmark"]
+json = ["serde_json"]
+full = ["syntax", "markdown", "json"]
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level = "z"
+lto = true
+codegen-units = 1
+panic = "abort"
+strip = true
+
+[[example]]
+name = "basic"
+path = "examples/basic.rs"
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "render_bench"
+harness = false
